blocks.content: As Rian slowly closed the gap and watched for an opportunity to attack,
Tess shouted in frustration.

blocks.speaker: Tess
blocks.content: You moron! Save the fighting for later and free us first!
That's what I've been saying, you jerk! If you don't want to see
me go crazy, hurry up and free us from these cuffs!

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Alright! Just hold on a second!
In any case, Rian and Tess had similar tendencies. Unlike a mage who
assessed the situation until an opportunity arose, Rian rushed forward with the intention of removing
the panels first.
At that moment, a shock wave occurred before his eyes. As the stinging
pain forced him to retreat, Rian looked up to see Kariel floating in the air with an annoyed expression,
his hand outstretched.
BOOM
The shockwave appearing in empty space was surprising, but not as
destructive as expected.
Rian, who had been intimidated by the title of archangel, grabbed his
greatsword with newfound hope.
Canis was also paying attention to the information Rian had
obtained.
- The Archangel's abilities are weaker than expected. This could be our chance.
- It must be because of that Elixir of Life or something. Creating humans can't be an easy task, right?
- I guess so. But this is unexpected? Despite our presence, is he really going to continue?
Angels are strong, but they don't exist solely for combat.
For instance, the ability of Archangel Ikael was Activation, which
seemed unrelated to combat.
However, because the concept was so grand, even Maras and other angels
were terrified of it.
Cariel also had a grand concept of Birth.
Explosions, ignition, machinery, drugs, etc.
The number of things he could create by combining existing elements was
nearly infinite.
But of all them, what Kariel was most proud of was life.
No matter what object he created, the energy focused on birth itself was
immense.
Especially when it came to the Elixir of Life, creating life forms
required almost all of an archangel's mental strength.

blocks.speaker: Kariel
blocks.content: How dare you interfere with an archangel's mission. Humans who
can't even live for a hundred years are so arrogant.
Canis secretly sent Harvest into the darkness. The plan was to buy time,
then ambush Cariel and rescue the women in the ensuing chaos.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: A mission from an angel? What are you trying to do by creating
Nephilim? Unlockers can be found anywhere in our world.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Heaven is trying to use Nephilim to attack the human world. They are
trying to balance the power because there are many Unlockers in our world.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Conquest? Are you saying there's going to be a war?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Yes. Nephilim were not like messengers of God. They were spies sent to
invade territories.

blocks.speaker: Kariel
blocks.content: You should be thankful. Thanks to you, we can now wage the final
war.
Amy and her friends focused their attention on Kariel. The term
final war was unsettling, but they couldn't understand what he meant by being able to wage
it now.

blocks.speaker: Kariel
blocks.content: The final war?

blocks.speaker: Kariel
blocks.content: Exactly as it sounds. The world of humans will soon be destroyed.
Up until now, the abominable Miro has prevented the end, but because of you, the prelude to war has
finally begun.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: But why is it thanks to us? What did we do?

blocks.speaker: Kariel
blocks.content: The woman named Miro has been blocking the passage between Heaven
and the human world. However, a new path has been opened through the Meta Gate you brought. Soon, the
armies of Heaven will mercilessly burn the humans.
Everyone's heart sank. If Cariel's words were true, they had committed
an irreversible act. The destruction of humanity had been accelerated because of them.

blocks.speaker: Kariel
blocks.content: Now, behold! This is the Meta Gate that Ikasa brought! Once the Elixir
of Life is complete, I will analyze the coordinates. The moment the new portal opens, your world will be
destroyed!
Amy and her friends's gaze turned simultaneously.
The Great Hall of the World fell silent. No one spoke.
When the expected reaction did not come out, Kariel slowly turned his
head, feeling puzzled. Then, he too wore the same expression.
A fairy clutching the Meta Gate was staring at them with an open
mouth.
Kariel tried to say something but closed his mouth again.

blocks.speaker: Peope
blocks.content: H- Hello.
Kariel tilted his head. Was she greeting him? If so, she at least wasn't
completely mad. He spoke, hoping that this question would yield some reasonable plausibility.

blocks.speaker: Kariel
blocks.content: Who are you?

blocks.speaker: Peope
blocks.content: It's Peope.
Kariel felt a surge of anger. But revealing his emotions was beneath
him, so he forced himself to remain calm.

blocks.speaker: Kariel
blocks.content: Right, Peope. Why are you here?

blocks.speaker: Peope
blocks.content: Oh, I'm here to retrieve the Meta Gate.
…I see. Then why… Haa, why are you, of all people, trying to retrieve
it?

blocks.speaker: Peope
blocks.content: That's because there shouldn't be a war.
At that moment, Kariel's patience snapped. He reached out his hand with
the sole intention of blowing up the pest in front of him.
Die.
- Harvest! Now!
From the shadows of the Great Hall of World, Harvest sprang out.
The moment Harvest swung his shadow as sharp as a blade, Kariel flew up
to the ceiling.
Taking advantage of the opportunity, Canis ran towards the women,
shouting.

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Rian! Protect Peope! Don't let him take her!
Rian immediately changed direction and dashed towards Peope.
Though he desperately wanted to rescue Tess, he knew it was best to follow the mage's instructions in such a
critical situation.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Peope! Come this way!
Peope, who was startled by the sudden battle, flew towards Rian at his
call.
Kariel tried to shake off Harvest's pursuit and aimed for Peope.
However, Rian grabbed his greatsword first and intercepted, so he abruptly changed direction and flew
back up to the ceiling.
Rian, who was relieved, looked back at Peope.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Huu, are you okay?

blocks.speaker: Peope
blocks.content: I don't know! I thought I was going to die from fear! Just take this
quickly!
Peope's face was as pale as soup. It was a situation where she had to
provoke an archangel. Even now, she couldn't understand how she managed to respond.
Rian was handed the Meta Gate. Even he, who was as stoic as he was,
couldn't help but be moved.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Thank you, Peope.

blocks.speaker: Peope
blocks.content: Don't get me wrong! I didn't mean to help you…!
Peope stopped mid-sentence. The situation was too obvious for her to
find words to hide her true feelings.
He disobeyed archangel's command and helped humans. It was not a
violation of the law, but an act that completely burned them.

blocks.speaker: Peope
blocks.content: So, what do you plan to do now? I'm finished now.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Come with us.

blocks.speaker: Peope
blocks.content: What?

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Come with us. There's a lot of interesting stuff in our world. Since
you saved us, we will do our best to save you.

blocks.speaker: Peope
blocks.content: Forget it, you dummy! Think about it after you've saved your
friends!
While keeping a close watch over the surroundings, Rian watched Canis'
progress.
Canis was currently using the power of darkness to cut through the women's handcuffs.
- The Elixir of Life progress: 40 percent.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Shut up, you pumpkin! If my concentration wavers, I'll cut your
wrists off too!
Canis was using razor-sharp shadows to carefully cut through the three
women's handcuffs. It was a precise operation as the cuffs was in full contact with the women's
flesh.
Kariel, dodging Harvest's attacks, was growing increasingly annoyed. He
considered canceling the Elixir of Life and slaughtering everyone instead.
With the power of birth, there were probably 50,000 ways to kill
them.
But canceling the Elixir of Life was not an option.
Even though the transmission rate exceeded 40 percent, no woman tested
positive.

blocks.speaker: Kariel
blocks.content: These are the best materials. I can never give them up.
As a last resort, Kariel opened a portal.
With the remaining mental strength, he could summon a pretty decent
Mara, and on top of that, he could think of someone who would be just right for the situation.

blocks.speaker: Kariel
blocks.content: Answer my call, Baalb.
As new Mara appeared, the Great Hall of World was dyed in an ominous
color. Everyone except Canis looked up at the ceiling and checked the number of horns first.
It was a two-horned Mara.

blocks.speaker: Baalb
blocks.content: Baalb, the Dream Mara, at your service, Kariel-nim.
He was a stylishly aged middle-aged man. His hair was slicked back with
oil, revealing pointed ears.
He was as tall as an angel and wore a cloak with a collar higher than
his head.

blocks.speaker: Baalb
blocks.content: Subdue the humans. The Elixir of Life must not be interrupted.

blocks.speaker: Baalb
blocks.content: That is certainly my specialty. Understood.
Baalb landed on the ground with his right hand on his chest.

blocks.speaker: Baalb
blocks.content: Peope, take this for a moment.
Rian, who had entrusted the Meta Gate to Peope, rushed towards Baalb.
However, even though he rushed with the determination to die, he couldn't even get close. As soon as he
neared Baalb, he felt drowsy, and his consciousness began to blur.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: What's this? Why am I suddenly sleepy…?
In a life-threatening situation, it would have been impossible to become
sleepy unless he went mad.
It was clearly some kind of ability.
Rian, who had realized this, hurriedly retreated.
As he exited the invisible zone, his consciousness returned.
However, the fatigue from lack of sleep still remained in his body.
It was an infuriating situation.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Damn it, what kind of trick is this?
From giants to fairies, from Mara to angels, they all had ridiculous
abilities. Looking back, he feel ashamed that he came to Heaven only to be a burden to his
friends.

blocks.speaker: Baalb
blocks.content: It's no use. You won't even be able to swing your sword at me.
A red gem floated slowly around Baalb. Could that be the problem?
Rian adopted a stance and slowly closed the distance.
As expected, after passing a certain boundary, the red gem began to glow and he began to feel drowsy again.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Damn. So, it is that. What the hell is that?
- Canis, this isn't good. We should retreat for now. It's an Objet

blocks.speaker: Canis
blocks.content: Object? That's an object?
Canis had also only heard about it from Arcane, but this was his first time seeing one in person.
An Object is an object.
What makes them different from ordinary objects is that they exert a
strange influence on the outside world.
Some objects are familiar to humans as well.
Some Objects are familiar to humans. Examples include cursed blue
diamonds or flying carpets.
Since it was something that humans also collected quite a bit, it was
not strange for Maras who traveled around countless worlds to have one.
The blood-sucking Objets possessed by some Mara are said to suck the
blood of those around them. Also, the Objets of Hatred can cause anger and cause people to commit
murder.
Baalb's Object was a sleep-inducing Objet, an item that would cause any
living creature within its sphere of influence to fall asleep.
